title: ClanAscend
description: ClanAscend is a Minecraft clans plugin that lets players create and manage clans, invite members, and track basic progression like power and levels.
body:
**If you encounter any issues, please report them through Spigot.** [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/clanascend-1-19x-1-21x.132242/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/clanascend-1-19x-1-21x.132242/) **ClanAscend** is a clans plugin for Minecraft (Spigot/Paper) that lets players create and manage clans with a complete feature set. You can support the plugin by making a donation through this link: [https://paypal.me/PabloHernandez601](https://paypal.me/PabloHernandez601)
Join my Support Discord Server
## 📤 Installation Guide This plugin is compatible from version 1.19.4 to 1.21x. Download the latest version of the plugin and upload it to your server's plugins folder. Once uploaded, restart the server for the changes to take effect. ## ✅ Features: - Create clans with configurable name and tag limits (min/max). - Invite players and accept invitations to join a clan. - Clan chest: Share items with the members of your clan. - Power system: gain/lose power from kills, deaths, online time, and special events. - Chunk-based territory claims, with power cost and refund on unclaim. - Claim protection: block breaking/placing, PvP, and other interactions based on config. - Clan chat with a configurable prefix (e.g., !) and customizable format. - Main GUI to view clan info, members, territory, top rankings, and leave the clan. - Clan + player leaderboards based on power and stats. - Admin commands (/clanadmin) for moderation and maintenance actions. - Fully configurable via config.yml + language support through LanguageManager. - Full GUI customization. ## 🆕 Variables: - %clanascend_clan% - %clanascend_name% - %clanascend_tag% - %clanascend_clan_formatted% - %clanascend_in_clan% - %clanascend_members% - %clanascend_max_members% - %clanascend_power% - %clanascend_max_power% - %clanascend_level% - %clanascend_exp% - %clanascend_experience% - %clanascend_claims% - %clanascend_max_claims% - %clanascend_leader% - %clanascend_desc% - %clanascend_description% - %clanascend_created% ## 🧑‍💼 Permissions: - clanascend.admin - clanascend.reload - clanascend.disband.others - clanascend.bypass.claims ## ⌨️ Commands: - /clan - /clan create - /clan invite - /clan help - /clan accept - /clan leave - /clan kick - /clan disband - etc... ## 📸 Screenshots: ![ClanAscend GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52565fc7526830d867e2a9fbe3dc8963f9a15f4d.png) This is the main GUI for the Clans.
